basic_details.job_title: VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Vardhman Mahavir Medical College & Safdarjung Hospital
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda): BAMS degree from a recognized College or university approved by NCISM. Desirable: M.D. (Ay.)/ M.S. (Ay.) and well knowledge of computer; research experience under Ministry of Ayush, ICMR, CSIR, DST or equivalent; skill of drafting editing of scientific documents; knowledge of MS Office, excel etc. Office Assistant: Graduation Degree from a recognized College or university. Ability to read, write, communicate and type English/Local language. Desirable: Knowledge of basic Computer application like MS Office, excel etc.; Experience in data collection, data analysis, data monitoring etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 42,000/+ HRA per month (Senior Research Fellow); Rs. 24,356 per month (Office Assistant)
salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda): Rs. 42,000/+ HRA per month Office Assistant: Rs. 24,356 per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 19 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda) post at Vardhman Mahavir Medical College & Safdarjung Hospital.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Office Assistant post is a Graduation Degree from a recognized College or university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda) position is Rs. 42,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts includes a Walk-in Interview and a Written Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at Vardhman Mahavir Medical College & Safdarjung Hospital, New Delhi - 110029.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations provided for the candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided as per the rules of the Government of India.
